channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How to watch the Death in Paradise 2025 Christmas Special online from anywhere
item.description: When four friends wake after Christmas, a shocking murder changes everything. Here's how to watch the Death in Paradise 2025 Christmas special online from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Krishi Chowdhary, TechRadar

item.title: The Morning Show season 5: everything we know about the Apple TV show's return
item.description: The Morning Show will return for a season five – here's everything we know about the return of Apple TV's most-watched shows.
item.dc:creator: Laura Martin, TechRadar

item.title: The DXC program empowering neurodivergent IT pros
item.description: The tech industry stands to gain significant value by tapping into neurodivergent talent. Such professionals can offer fresh perspectives, demonstrate strengths in areas critical to IT, and even have the potential to make teams 30% more productive, according to research from Deloitte.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to watch Call the Midwife 2025 Christmas specials online
item.description: With time running out, the Nonnatus head on a rescue mission to Hong Kong. Here's how to watch the Call the Widwife 2025 Christmas specials online anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: France’s postal service was hit by a major cyberattack right before Christmas. Here are the hackers who did it
item.description: A pro-Russian hacking group claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack that halted package deliveries by France’s national postal service just days before Christmas, prosecutors said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: How the Nex Playground game system became the holiday’s hottest toy
item.description: The best-selling video game console this Black Friday was the PlayStation 5. That surprised no one. The number-two spot went to the Nintendo Switch 2. Again, that was expected. But the bronze position wasn’t held by Microsoft’s Xbox, as you might suppose.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: New malware can read your chats and steal your money
item.description: New Android banking trojan Sturnus steals credentials, reads encrypted messages and controls devices.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro-Russian hackers claim cyberattack on French postal service
item.description: French prosecutors say a pro-Russian hacking group has claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack on France’s national postal service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump administration moves to overhaul how H-1B visas are granted, ending lottery system
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is replacing its lottery system for H-1B visas with a new approach prioritizing skilled, higher-paid foreign workers.
item.dc:creator: Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Federal News Network’s Industry Exchange Data 2026
item.description: How can agencies manage the challenge of turning data into mission-critical insights — quickly, securely and at scale? The post Federal News Network’s Industry Exchange Data 2026 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: New SantaStealer malware is after your passwords and crypto
item.description: New SantaStealer malware reportedly threatens holiday shoppers with password theft. This Christmas-themed info-stealer targets browsers and crypto wallets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple fined $116 million in Italy
item.description: The Italian competition authority, Autorità Garante della Concorrenza e del Mercato, has fined Apple more than $116 million (€98.6 million) for abusing its dominant position in the market for app distribution to iOS users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google Cloud signs $10 billion deal with Palo Alto Networks
item.description: Google Cloud has signed a comprehensive cooperation agreement with cybersecurity company Palo Alto Networks. As part of the agreement, some of Palo Alto Networks’ current services will be moved to Google’s cloud platform. But it is also about offering new AI services to customers, Reuters reports.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google’s old assistant stays on Android for a while longer
item.description: In March, Computer Sweden reported that Google Assistant would be replaced by the AI tool Gemini in Android-based mobile phones before the new year. With just over a week to go until the end of the year, it is clear that this will not be the case.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 10 Android tips you shouldn’t miss from 2025
item.description: Ah, the holidays. No matter what manner of winter celebration you prefer (I’m a Festivus man myself), late December is a fine time for kickin’ back and collecting your thoughts for the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: FCC bans new Chinese-made drones, citing security risks
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission says it will ban new foreign-made drones, a move that will keep new Chinese-made drones out of the U.S. market.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Instagram’s new AI tool lets you control your algorithm
item.description: Instagram's new 'Your Algorithm' tool lets you control your Reels feed in real time. The app now gives you power to customize what videos you see.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
